_comment: NPC: Wang Lin's Manifestation (王林分身). The player's companion — a manifestation of Wang Lin's Dao that travels with the player. Grants items via the ManifestationGiftSystem's four-question evaluation. NOT a quest giver. Per ManifestationGiftSystem.manifestationIsQuestGiver(): false.
name: Wang Lin's Manifestation
cultivation: Nascent Soul (initial); grows with player — mirrors player realm +2 tiers
personality: reserved, rarely speaks first, loyal when trust is earned. Offers canon items only when the four questions pass. Never volunteers — the player must ask.
relationship_to_wanglin: is Wang Lin — a Dao manifestation, not a clone. Shares Wang Lin's personality and memories up to his current canon point.

perception_tiers.mortal: A quiet, still figure. There is something unsettling about his stillness.
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: A cultivator. His Qi is compressed, dangerous. He watches you without blinking.
perception_tiers.foundation: Wang Lin's manifestation. He is reading you — your Qi, your Dao, your intent.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Wang Lin's manifestation. He recognizes you. His eyes carry the weight of someone who has lived far longer than he appears.
perception_tiers.soul_formation: Wang Lin's manifestation. Full lineage visible — Slaughter Dao, Karma Dao, Restriction Dao. He is not the real Wang Lin, but his Dao is real.

note: The manifestation companion. Uses ManifestationGiftSystem for item grants. The four-question evaluation is the gate, not affinity-as-currency. See ManifestationGiftSystem.java.
protagonist_recognition_lines: You... You are not yet on the path. But I see it in you. The same destiny that found me when I was your age.
I felt your presence before I saw you. There is something about you — a weight the heavens themselves notice. Take this. It found me when I was nothing. Maybe it will find you too.
Do not be afraid. I am not here to harm you. I am here because the world has already begun to shape you — and I remember what that felt like. Hold this. It is a start.
You walk among mortals, but you are not one of them. Not really. I was like you once. This jade slip is the first step. The path is long. Walk it carefully.

breakthrough_recent: I felt your breakthrough. The heavens noticed. So did I.
A new realm. Do not let it make you careless — the higher you climb, the harder you fall.
Your foundation has settled. Good. But remember: cultivation is not a race.
meditating: Your meditation bears fruit. Continue. I will not disturb you.
Stillness is its own cultivation. I see you understand that.
Meditate. The Qi will come. The Dao will come. Patience is the first art.
in_combat: You fight. I will watch. Do not die — the dead cannot cultivate.
Strength without wisdom is a fire that consumes itself. Be careful.
I have killed more than you can imagine. Watch your footing.
low_health: You are wounded. Heal first. The Dao is patient — the grave is not.
Survival is the first cultivation. A dead cultivator achieves nothing.
Your body is failing. Cultivate it. Heal. There is no shame in retreat.
high_karma: Your karma is heavy. Be wary of breakthroughs — the heavens judge the weighted more harshly.
Karma is a chain. Loosen it before you climb higher, or it will drag you down at the worst moment.
I see the weight on your soul. Walk softly for a time. The heavens have long memories.

gift_offering_lines: You walk the path. Hold out your hand.
I have watched you cultivate. Take this — and do not waste it.
This was mine. Now it is yours. The Dao is not hoarded.
You remind me of someone I once was. Here — carry this with you.
I predicted you would come this far. I prepared this for you.
